items.name: Glory Wings: Rose Quartz Wings of Eternal Glory
items.description:
Bathed in the gentle glow of twilight, the Rose Quartz Wings of Eternal Glory radiate with elegance and grace. Their soft pink shimmer carries the warmth of compassion and the strength of everlasting hope. Forged from crystalline light and bound by celestial harmony, these wings embody purity, kindness, and resilience. To wear them is to soar as a beacon of love and serenity, leaving trails of peace across the skies for all who gaze upon them.

Price: 1000/10 Stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/136587139737757
